blocks.text: El Derbi Madrileño — Madrid's title fate hangs in the balance tonight

Barcelona sit 4 points clear at the summit. Real Madrid must win tonight or gift Barça breathing room they may never surrender. Atlético, 13 adrift of the leaders, can only play spoiler at the Bernabéu.
🏎️ Fri 03:30 — Suzuka: Japanese GP, Russell leads Antonelli by just 4 points in the 2026 title fight
